hero.headline: Implementation specialist with proven enterprise deployment expertise
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS implementations across global markets with full lifecycle ownership. 5 years translating business requirements into working system configurations — from scoping through post-go-live support. Expert in client stakeholder management and cross-functional project coordination.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations for mid-to-large clients with full lifecycle project ownership from scoping through post-go-live support and client handoff.
Coordinated client workshops with executives and operational teams; translated business requirements into structured BRDs, system configurations, and project plans with defined timelines.
Configured and tested SaaS platforms tailored to each client's operational needs, ensuring successful deployment and user adoption.
Managed cross-functional coordination between clients and internal teams (product, engineering, design) to ensure successful implementation outcomes.

highlights.label: Project framework
highlights.text: Developed a use-case-driven implementation methodology with complexity scoring and effort estimation models — enabling accurate project scoping, automated timeline calculation, and reduced requirement ambiguity.

highlights.label: Process improvement
highlights.text: Identified gaps in scope-change tracking and collaborated with Sales to implement Professional Services credit system — converting ad-hoc changes into structured, billable project units.

highlights.label: Global deployment
highlights.text: Executed on-site implementations in Saudi Arabia and UK for high-value engagements — conducting requirement gathering, stakeholder workshops, and go-live training across international markets.

highlights.label: Implementation success
highlights.text: Achieved 4 of 5 pilot-to-enterprise conversions through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and stakeholder alignment — driving $350K+ in expansion revenue.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed data quality and operational defect resolution across Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now platforms — improving system reliability and operational efficiency.
Designed a systematic defect prioritisation framework using forecasts, inventory values, and usage metrics — delivering an estimated $230K in monthly operational savings.
Analyzed process gaps and streamlined workflows between support teams, reducing invalid case assignments by approximately 50 cases per day.
